---
title: ""
format: 
  html:
    toc: false
    anchor-sections: false
---



:::{.hero}

:::{.hero-content}

<p></p>

<h1>Transforming data into actionable insights</h1>

<p class="subtitle">Data analysis, visualization & automated reporting</p>


:::

:::



:::{.home-about}

:::{.home-about-image}
<img src="/assets/img/mg.png"
     class="img-about-home"
     alt="Portrait of Mathieu Genu">

:::

:::{.home-about-presentation}

# Mathieu Genu

## Freelance data analyst

Interested in data visualisation, I am continuously learning to improve my skills to highlight what data have to say.

I have sharpened my skills in data manipulation and data visualisation during 10 years of professional experience in ecological modelling and as an R package programmer.



<div class="home-about-buttons">
<a href="/about" class="btn-primary">More about me</a>
</div>

:::

:::


<h2 style="padding-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; text-align: center; font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 600;">
  Services
</h2>

<div class="service-container">

<div class="service-card">
<h3>🔍 Data Analysis</h3>
<ul>
<li>Data cleaning and preparation</li>
<li>Descriptive and inferential statistical analysis</li>
<li>Modeling and bayesian inference</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="service-card">
<h3>📊 Data Visualization</h3>
<ul>
<li>Interactive and static charts</li>
<li>Custom dashboards</li>
<li>Advanced visualizations with ggplot2, plotly, etc.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="service-card">
<h3>💻 Shiny App Development</h3>
<ul>
<li>Creation of interactive web applications</li>
<li>Business/Analysis process automation</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="service-card">
<h3>📄 Automated Reporting with Quarto</h3>
<ul>
<li>Dynamic report generation in HTML, PDF, and Word</li>
<li>Integration of analyses and graphics</li>
<li>Automated updates</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="service-card">
<h3>📦 R Package Development</h3>
<ul>
<li>Creation of custom R packages</li>
<li>Code modularization and documentation</li>
<li>Package testing and CRAN submission</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>

<div style="padding-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; text-align: center; font-size: 2rem">
📩 **Need a custom service? <a href="mailto:mathieu.genu@gmail.com">Contact me!</a>**
</div>


<h2 style="padding-top: 8rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; text-align: center; font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 600;">
  Featured projects
</h2>

:::{.card-grid}

<div class="card">
  <h3>RLA</h3>
  <p>An R package to estimate removal limit of animals</p>
  <a href="projects/RLA/index.qmd" class="card-link"></a>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>Shiny app</h3>
  <p>Interactive visualisations of aerial survey campaign results.</p>
  <a href="projects/SPEE/index.qmd" class="card-link"></a>
</div>

:::
